curation_notes: The advisory references merge commit 5e3167e (Merge branch 'master' into add-django-axes) as the patch. This is a merge commit on the add-django-axes feature branch with two parents: 6568666 (feature branch head, already contains the fix) and f38a27c (master, does not contain the fix). The pre-patch commit is set to f38a27c (the second parent / master state) since it represents the vulnerable codebase without django-axes rate limiting. The patch adds django-axes middleware, authentication backend, and configuration to wger/settings_global.py, and passes the request object to the authenticate() call in wger/core/views/user.py. Locations derived from the patch diff: settings_global.py (missing rate-limiting middleware/backend/config) and user.py registration function (missing request parameter for axes tracking).
